final:
module top_module (
        input m,
        input n,
        input o,
  wire temp1_( ~m & ~n & o ) |
           ( ~m & n & ~o ) |
           ( m & ~n & ~o ) |
           ( m & ~n & o ) = ( ~m & ~n & o ) |
           ( ~m & n & ~o ) |
           ( m & ~n & ~o ) |
           ( m & ~n & o );
  wire temp2_( m & n & o ) = ( m & n & o );
  assign s = temp1_( ~m & ~n & o ) |
           ( ~m & n & ~o ) |
           ( m & ~n & ~o ) |
           ( m & ~n & o ) | temp2_( m & n & o ) ;

endmodule
